title: harpalium rigidum
intro: Harpalium rigidum, also known as stiff stalked harpalium, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Harpalium rigidum is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and has been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its ability to soothe and calm the body.
